examples: Set off the road again, over the toilsome way they had come.
Housework is usually miscellaneous and toilsome.
There will be a toilsome journey tomorrow.
The majority of the old stuck to toilsome hand-scrubbing.
The prevailing style is realist, but it is regularly beset by mixed, toilsome aims: Wall has harbored enough motives to impel several artists, and they have tended to get in the way of one another.
